nasb.text: Then the angel whom I saw standing on the sea and on the land lifted up his right hand to heaven,

esv.text: And the angel whom I saw standing on the sea and on the land raised his right hand to heaven

cnv.text: 我看見那站在海上和地上的天使，向天舉起右手來，

ccb.text: 我刚才所见的那位脚踏海洋和陆地的天使向天举起右手，

csbs.text: 接着，我所看见的那位站在海上和地上的天使，向天举起他的右手，
